title: Crafting a Product Roadmap Document
scenario: Write a product roadmap document for a new software product that includes features such as user management, data analytics, and integration with third-party services. The target audience is product stakeholders who want to track product development and plan for future releases. The roadmap should include a clear description of the product vision, the features included in each release, and the timeline for development. The final output should be a markdown formatted text that outlines the roadmap.
constraints: Should include at least 3 releases in the roadmap

evaluationCriteria.description: The roadmap should clearly describe the product vision and goals.
The roadmap should adhere to the word count and release count constraints.
The roadmap should include a clear description of each feature included in each release.
The roadmap should include a timeline for development and release of each feature.
